# ADR Folder Notes

This folder stores standalone ADR files when a decision needs independent lifecycle tracking.

Current architectural decisions are documented in:
- `.github/project/design-plan.md` (ADR-BP-001, ADR-BP-002, ADR-BP-003)

Guideline:
- Keep decisions in the design plan during early design drafting.
- Create standalone ADR files here when a decision is cross-cutting, contested, or requires revision history.
